name: @ever-works/secret-store-infisical-plugin
description: Infisical SecretStoreResolver plugin for Ever Works — resolves infisical:<workspaceId>/<env>/<path> pointers via the Infisical REST API. OSS-friendly self-hostable + SaaS secrets platform.

plugin.name: Infisical Secret Store
plugin.description: Resolves infisical:<workspaceId>/<env>/<secretPath> pointers via the Infisical REST API (OSS, self-hostable + SaaS). Fetches a folder of secrets and returns them as a flat credential bag.

envVars.name: INFISICAL_TOKEN
envVars.description: Infisical Service Token or Machine Identity token with read access to requested paths.

envVars.name: INFISICAL_HOST
envVars.description: Base URL for self-hosted Infisical. Defaults to https://app.infisical.com.
